message:
feat(sql): add compiled string functions and remove interpreted fallback

- Implement UPPER/LOWER in JIT codegen using string arena
- Implement string concatenation (||) in compiled execution
- Add string_arena parameter to function signature when needed
- Add needs_string_arena detection during expression analysis
- Fix type inference for concat to return string type
- Delete executeInterpreted and related fallback functions
- All 74 SQL tests pass with 100% compiled execution
